divisions.title: Elisha
divisions.summary: Chariots of fire, Naaman’s healing, and miracles among ordinary people.

divisions.title: Jehu’s Purge
divisions.summary: Jehu destroys Ahab’s house and Baal’s temple — but not the calves.

divisions.title: The Fall of Israel
divisions.summary: Kings rise and fall until Assyria carries the ten tribes away, 722 BC.

divisions.title: Hezekiah & Isaiah
divisions.summary: Sennacherib’s taunt, Hezekiah’s prayer, and an angel routs an army.

divisions.title: Manasseh & Josiah
divisions.summary: Manasseh fills Jerusalem with blood; Josiah finds the lost Book of the Law.

divisions.title: The Fall of Jerusalem
divisions.summary: Babylon breaches the walls; temple burned, people exiled. The spine’s darkest hour.
